---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or screenshots if possible.

## Environment

- **OS**: (e.g., macOS 15.2, Ubuntu 24.04)
- **Node.js version**: (run `node --version`)
- **AI Provider**: (OpenAI / Ollama)
- **AI Model**: (e.g., gpt-4o, qwen2.5:14b)
- **Browser**: (e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121)

## Additional context

Any other context — logs, screenshots, or config details.
